title: reaumuria reflexa subsp. reflexa
intro: Reaumuria reflexa subsp. reflexa, also known as Chinese sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Tamaricaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine for its diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating conditions such as urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and edema. The health benefits of Reaumuria reflexa subsp. reflexa include its ability to relieve symptoms of cystitis, improve blood circulation, and act as a natural detoxifier. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and can also be applied topically as an ointment or cream to treat skin conditions.
